summary: Comprehensive testing of NEXUS_AI Autonomous Distributed Workflow Intelligence System completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functional with minor React Flow and chart rendering issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Workflow graph edges not rendering - 'Couldn't create edge for source handle id: null'
Chart sizing issues - 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'

issues: Missing Dialog Description for accessibility compliance

passed_tests: Create workflow functionality (ETL, microservice, batch types)
Real-time metrics display (CPU, Memory, Latency, Throughput)
Event stream/logs display with live updates
Predictions panel showing failure risk predictions
AI Brain analyze logs functionality with GPT-5.2
All backend API endpoints (21/21 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React Flow edge rendering issue in WorkflowGraph component - edges are not connecting nodes properly due to null source handle IDs. Fix chart sizing issues in MetricsCharts component. Improve WebSocket connection stability.
